question: The chart shows the labeled percentages for different Valentine’s gift categories. Which statement is supported by these labeled values?

options.A: Jewelry has the highest labeled percentage among all the categories.
options.B: Candy has the highest labeled percentage among all the categories.
options.C: Cards and Clothing have the same labeled percentage.
options.D: Dining Out has a higher labeled percentage than Candy.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
